text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of Matikanetannhauser's debut race is
finally here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for my debut!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've been sculpting my body for today—look at
this form!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
My parents said they're going to be cheering me
on from their restaurant.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Okay! I'm gonna blast this race open and take
home the win!
choice_data_list: Right! Do your best out there!
Right! Do your best out there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that promise made, we head enthusiastically
to the waiting room!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's still some time before the race. I figure we
might as well review our strategy, but when I turn
around to talk to Matikanetannhauser...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I went into the wrong room, ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Man, I always seem to mess something up
whenever I get serious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's certainly motivated, though a bit
unfocused.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I just need to refocus and do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Matikanetannhauser's debut race begins!
